messages.author: swarm
messages.text: This ticket needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve" to approve it.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Extension test helpers must clean up their /tmp mkdtemp dirs (the leak's source)
What it solves: WHY THIS, NOT JUST THE SWEEP (BL-413): the sweep bounds the STOCK (removes
accumulated + crash-orphaned sandboxes); this bounds the FLOW at the source.
The generator is measured: ~147 extension test files call
`fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'sfvc-*'))` (and relay-*/negotiate-*)
once per tes…
How it works: The shared temp-dir helper removes the exact directory it created when the test's teardown runs (assert that path, never a /tmp listing)

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-420 - Extension test helpers must clean up their /tmp mkdtemp dirs (the leak's source) is complete.
